issues.description: DSL missing the core protective effect. Card text states 'this Character cannot be K.O.'d by effects' when opponent has ≤3 Life — requires a condition check and a protective keyword/action, not a GiveDon action.
Trigger 'Activated' is incorrect. The cost '[DON!! x2]' is a play cost, not an activated ability. Should use 'OnPlay' trigger.
Second effect with 'Trigger' and 'PlaySelf' is nonsensical and does not correspond to card text.
GiveDon action does not match card effect. The DON cost is paid to play the card, not an effect action.
Condition 'Always' is incorrect. Should check 'OpponentLifeCount ≤ 3' or equivalent condition type.
